examples: The silence and emptiness of the house did not scare her.
"Wu" means enlightening. "Kong" means emptiness, which is one of the most important understandings in Buddhism.
Kris and I love food, and our fridge is usually filled with tons of good stuff, so seeing the vast emptiness was almost shocking.
As we went inside, we were taken aback by the emptiness that was left behind.
It is a sad and sterile emptiness at the heart of a noble enterprise.
